stock_market.summary: U.S. stock futures are climbing on positive signals regarding the Iran war. Indices show strong gains (Nasdaq +0.89%, S&P 500 +0.94%) following recent volatility.

key_metrics.impact: Market sentiment shifting from war-induced selloff to cautious optimism; monitoring yields and supply chain stability.

art_market.summary: Market shows structural recovery with global sales reaching $59.6 billion. Focus remains on provenance-heavy assets and Impressionist/Modern categories.

key_metrics.major_events: Christie's featuring Claude Lalanne's 'La Pomme de New York'; U.S. auction sales growth of 23% in 2025.
key_metrics.status: Continued recovery; shift towards established categories.
